## Security review checklist

- [ ] No `child_process`, `eval`, `new Function` added
- [ ] No webview, URI handler, or context-file ingestion added
- [ ] No telemetry or analytics added
- [ ] All new config keys use `scope: "application"`
- [ ] Logger calls do not pass raw request/response objects
- [ ] No API keys, tokens, or secrets in code or logs
